annotations.query: The linesman raises his flag. Marouane Fellaini (Manchester United) is adjudged offside.
annotations.short-term: The linesman raises his flag. Marouane Fellaini is adjudged offside. He mistimed his run and went too early, making it an avoidable error.
annotations.label: offside
annotations.query_ano: The linesman raises his flag. [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) is adjudged offside.

annotations.query: Paul Pogba (Manchester United) collects a pass and strikes from about 35 metres out. It's a poor attempt which flies well over the bar.
annotations.short-term: Paul Pogba collects a pass and strikes from about 35 metres out. Positioned high up the pitch, his shot was poorly executed and flew well over the bar.
annotations.label: shoot
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) collects a pass and strikes from about 35 metres out. It's a poor attempt which flies well over the bar.

annotations.query: Zlatan Ibrahimovic (Manchester United) receives a pass and tries his luck with a shot from 20 metres out. Loris Karius pulls off a comfortable save to stop the effort going into the middle of the goal.
annotations.short-term: Zlatan Ibrahimovic receives a pass and tries his luck with a shot from 20 metres out. He managed to create space for the attempt, but the goalkeeper reacted well to make a routine save.

annotations.query: Emre Can (Liverpool) receives a pass and tries his luck with a long-range powerful effort. His poorly placed shot lacks accuracy and flies way over the crossbar.
annotations.short-term: Emre Can receives a pass and tries his luck with a long-range powerful effort. He got into range but failed to keep his shot on target, sending it high over the crossbar.
annotations.label: shoot
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) receives a pass and tries his luck with a long-range powerful effort. His poorly placed shot lacks accuracy and flies way over the crossbar.

annotations.query: A pass from Marcus Rashford (Manchester United) is intercepted by Loris Karius and the move breaks down.

annotations.query: Roberto Firmino (Liverpool) attempts to convert a cross into a goal, but his promising header from near the penalty spot towards the middle of the net is denied by David de Gea. This effort really didn't trouble him.
